chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1290 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 29-03-2022 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present nor any intimation has been received. We have perused the prayer clause, and apparently, the Petitioners are seeking a relief which is not permissible in law. Even otherwise, in C. P. No. D-1043 of 2018 (Re. Khadim Hussain Arain and others v. Province of Sindh and others), directions have been issued by this Court to remove all illegal pumping machines installed by the khatedars. In view of such position, the Petition is misconceived and is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
